hero.title: Hi, I'm Jessie
hero.subtitle: A developer who also takes life seriously.

story.title: About Me
story.p1: 7 years in frontend — from jQuery to React to Next.js. Somewhere along the way, I realized that writing code is just part of the job. Life is the bigger question.
story.p2: Right now I'm on a Working Holiday in Australia. Some days I'm debugging architecture, other days I'm figuring out where to find penguins. And sometimes, I'm just wondering what comes next.

travel.title: 🧭 Travel & WHV
travel.desc: Places I've been, mistakes I've made, real experiences

tech.title: 💻 Tech
tech.desc: Frontend dev, project practice, and exploring AI

journey.title: My Journey
journey.description: I'm not great at grand speeches. I write code, and I'm also running away from it. 7 years in frontend, from jQuery to React, and now looking toward AI. Tech changes, people change.

background.title: Key Milestones
background.experience: 7 years as a frontend engineer, from jQuery era to modern frameworks
background.skills: Specialized in React, TypeScript, Next.js and modern web tech
background.ai: Currently exploring AI, looking for what's next in tech
background.whv: On an Australian WHV, working and traveling

location.title: Currently in Australia
location.desc: This year on WHV in Australia, I've been working, traveling, and rethinking what work and life really mean.

philosophy.title: One Last Thing
philosophy.slogan: I hope something here finds you at the right moment.
philosophy.codeDesc: No perfect guides here, no success stories — just the roads I've walked, the pits I've fallen into, and some half-formed thoughts.
philosophy.lifeDesc: If you're also looking for direction, maybe we're on the same path.
philosophy.quote: The world is a book and those who do not travel read only one page.
